titleStmt.title: SII 39.73: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 73. (A.R. No. 73 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of lands situated at Maṇalūr alias Sundara-Pāṇḍya-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam a hamlet of Poṉṉamarāvati in Puramalai nāḍu as dēvadāṉa to the deity uḍaiyār-Tirukalkoṭukuṉṟamuḍaiyar for the merit of Kaṇiyadēvaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhu(va)ṉa cakkaravatti(ka)ḷ ko
ṉerimaiy koṇṭāṉ puṟama
lai nāṭṭup poṉṉamar(ā)patippā
l maṇalūrā(ṉa) cuntarapāṇṭiyac
caturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār
kku Ivvūr nāṉkellaikku Uḷppa
ṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉce(y) natta
mum nattappāḷum kuḷamum kuḷappari
ppu toṭṭakkūṟum maṟṟum yeppe
ṟppaṭṭavaiyiṟṟilum Uṭaiyār tiru
kkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku
t tevatāṉamāyp pontapaṟṟu nikki
nikki Uḷḷa samastaprāptikaḷum muṉṉuṭaiyā
rum paḻamperumutalil tavittu makkaṇāyaṉāṉa
kaṇṭiyatevar namperāl vaitta Ivvakarattil
vedaśāstram poy vyākhyatākkaḷāy Irukkum caturvedi
paṭṭarkaḷ per Irupatukku bhāgam Irupatum Ivvakarattil U
kantaruḷappaṇṇukiṟa cuntarapāṇṭiya Īvaramuṭaiyā
rkku bhāgam yiraṇṭum kaṇṭiyatevar viṇṇakar Āḻ
vārkku bhāgam yiraṇṭum Āka Irupattunalu bhāgamā
kak karaiyiṭṭuk koḷḷavum Ivaiyiṟṟāl Uḷḷa kaṭamai
yum Antarāyamum taruva(tāṉa) Accum kāriyavāraṭcciyu
(m) veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirappeṟum vācal
peṟum yilāñciṉaip peṟum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭa
Uḷppaṭa maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa varikaḷum Aṇṇāḻvikku
p patiṉālāvatu mutal taviṟtu taṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā
ka m Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak ko
(ṇṭu canti)rātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ
lum veṭṭikkoḷka (ip)paṭikku Ivai muttūṟṟuk kū
ṟṟattu Aṉantaṉūr ci mpāṉūr Uṭaiyāṉ vaṇṭuvā
Digital edition of SII 39.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
